name: MedicalGPT
desc: MedicalGPT: Training Your Own Medical GPT Model with ChatGPT Training Pipeline. 训练医疗大模型，实现了包括增量预训练(PT)、有监督微调(SFT)、RLHF、DPO、ORPO、GRPO。
descFull: MedicalGPT: Training Your Own Medical GPT Model with ChatGPT Training Pipeline. 训练医疗大模型，实现了包括增量预训练(PT)、有监督微调(SFT)、RLHF、DPO、ORPO、GRPO。
